Two follow-ups from v6.0.0 feedback: selective restore for the files domain, and a tidied-up dashboard.

## Added
- **Selective (partial) restore for file sets (#65).** The Files tab's restore panel can now list a snapshot's contents and restore only the files or folders you tick, into a folder you choose, instead of restoring the whole set. This mirrors the file-level restore containers already have, and shares the same file-tree picker component.

## Changed
- **Protection Status card is aligned (#66).** Every domain row now lays out on the same column grid, so containers, VMs, flash, config and files line up column for column regardless of which badges a row has. The long "proven restorable from off-site" badge wraps inside its column instead of running past the card edge.
